ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "prod_num" TEXT /* Product number assigned to the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the product was added */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the product (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the product is sold */,
  "sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the product */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "retail_price" REAL /* Retail price of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the product record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is the default status for new products */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual identification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South, West) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales team */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the team serves */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the team */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the team */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the manager record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales target */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales team */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target sales amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the target period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the target period */,
  "actual_amount" REAL /* Actual sales amount achieved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the target was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being promoted */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "promo_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., discount, bundle) */,
  "promo_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the promotion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Amount of sales on that date */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price at the time of sale */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotion, if applicable */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the sale (e.g., store, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_history_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the report period */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for sales data */,
  "average_sales" REAL /* Average sales amount for the report period */,
  "total_units_sold" INTEGER /* Total number of units sold */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
